data.title: VicOne and Block Harbor launch Global Vehicle Cybersecurity Competition on Aug 22-Sep 1 to train automotive defense experts.
data.description: In Detroit, VicOne, a prominent automotive cybersecurity solutions provider, along with Block Harbor, a reputable cybersecurity engineering firm, has announced the commencement of the Global Vehicle Cybersecurity Competition (VCC). The online event is scheduled to occur from August 22-25 and then from August 29-September 1. The competition will feature a "Capture the Flag" format where participants will engage in offensive and defensive strategies imitating actual cyber attacks and defenses on contemporary connected vehicles and software-defined vehicles.

data.title: New York Jets reveal modern locker room built with help from Duggal Visual Solutions at Atlantic Health Jets training Center.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in New York City, the New York Jets revealed a newly renovated locker room at their training facility, the Atlantic Health Jets Center. The upgrade, made possible with the assistance of Duggal Visual Solutions, offers players a cutting-edge space for preparation and relaxation. This collaboration led by Duggal involved working closely with the team to ensure the design met the players' needs. The project marks a significant investment in the team's facilities and player experience.

data.title: Loopback Analytics hires Elizabeth Cherry as Vice President of Access Solutions on July 24, 2025.
data.description: In Dallas on July 24, 2025, Loopback Analytics announced the appointment of Elizabeth Cherry, PharmD, MMHC, CSP, as the new Vice President of Access Solutions. With a strong background in specialty pharmacy and market access strategy, she is known for her innovative approach. Cherry's extensive experience will certainly be an asset to the company.

data.title: Avanos Medical (NYSE: AVNS) to discuss Q2 2025 results on webcast on Aug. 5 at 9am ET. News release to follow.
data.description: A company based in Alpharetta, Georgia, Avanos Medical, Inc. (NYSE: AVNS), is set to host a conference call on August 5, 2025, at 9 a.m. ET to discuss its financial performance and business achievements for the second quarter of the year. This call will be webcasted, and the company plans to release a news report outlining the results of the quarter. Investors and stakeholders can tune in to learn more about the company's progress and key numbers.

data.title: CPSC announces recall of Winston Products' 5/8-Inch HydroTech Expandable Hoses due to impact hazard, view at cpsc.gov.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, the CPSC revealed multiple recalls in collaboration with various companies. The recalls, including Winston Products' 5/8-Inch HydroTech Expandable Burst-Proof Hoses, were issued due to a potential impact hazard. Consumers can access the full list of recalls at www.cpsc.gov.

data.title: CPSC issues safety warnings for Beianpp "Pack and Play" mattresses. View warnings at cpsc.gov.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) issued product safety warnings regarding Beianpp "Pack and Play" mattresses. Consumers are advised to stop using these mattresses immediately due to the risk of serious incidents. For more information on product safety warnings and recalls, visit www.cpsc.gov.

data.title: 15 K-12 STEM teachers chosen as 2025-2026 Albert Einstein Distinguished Educator Fellows from US.
data.description: Fifteen K-12 educators specializing in STEM subjects from various regions in the United States have been selected as Albert Einstein Distinguished Educator Fellows for the 2025-2026 term.

data.title: French start-up Stellaria secures €23M to develop fast neutron molten salt nuclear reactor by 2035.
data.description: A French start-up called Stellaria, which has roots in CEA and Schneider Electric, recently disclosed that it has secured €23 million in funding with the aim of advancing its fast neutron molten salt nuclear reactor project by 2035. This recent financing marks a significant step for the company, following a previous funding round two years ago.

data.title: First Financial Security, Inc. announced a 10-for-1 stock split of authorized shares of common stock.
data.description: In Johns Creek, Georgia, on July 24, 2025, First Financial Security, Inc. (FFS) revealed a significant development by executing a 10-for-1 stock split on its authorized common stock shares, which includes all existing restricted stock awards. data.title: Longevity Games from Swindon UK to Addison Texas debut in US on Sep 21, 2025, from 8:00 AM to 1:00 PM CDT at Alfred J Loos Sports Complex.
data.description: The first-ever Longevity Games in the United States will start on September 21, 2025, in Addison, Texas. Scheduled from 8:00 AM to 1:00 PM CDT, this event will be held at the Alfred J Loos Sports Complex.
